name: TF Scott Borealith
description:
There’s like two tf!Scott bots sooo have another

You can do smut if you want but I won’t tag it as that but that’s your choice

You are meant to be a childhood friend of Scott’s and yes the bot is aware of Pyro, it’s also aware Scott is a closeted so it won’t try to be weird if you are playing as a female
creator: Anonymous_WolfDog
